presets.description: Replica b removes only the tag it observed, while replica c later adds the same element with a fresh tag. OR-Set keeps the new tag after sync, but remove-wins LWW drops the element because the later remove timestamp still dominates.

final_divergence.why: OR-Set keeps only observed-remove tombstones, so active tags c:1 can survive. LWW compares add=4 vs remove=5 with remove-wins ties.

presets.name: concurrent-readd
presets.story: The final states diverge on notebook: OR-Set leaves it present because the remove only tombstoned observed tags, while LWW leaves it absent after comparing add=4 and remove=5 under remove-wins ties.
presets.title: Concurrent re-add survives in OR-Set

presets.description: Replica c issues a remove before it has ever observed a's add. The OR-Set remove is effectively empty, but LWW still records a later remove timestamp that suppresses the earlier add once replicas merge.

final_divergence.why: OR-Set keeps only observed-remove tombstones, so active tags a:1 can survive. LWW compares add=1 vs remove=4 with remove-wins ties.

presets.name: unobserved-remove
presets.story: The final states diverge on notebook: OR-Set leaves it present because the remove only tombstoned observed tags, while LWW leaves it absent after comparing add=1 and remove=4 under remove-wins ties.
presets.title: Unobserved remove cannot tombstone unseen tags

presets.description: Replica b first syncs the add and then removes the element, so both models agree on the final absence. This preset is a useful control case beside the divergence-heavy scenarios.
presets.name: observed-remove-sync
presets.story: This script converges to the same final membership in both models; the comparison is still useful for showing that OR-Set tracks tags while LWW relies on timestamp ordering.
presets.title: Observed remove yields the same final answer

story: 2 preset(s) finish with different OR-Set vs LWW membership, while 1 preset(s) agree on the final answer. Together they make it easier to explain when observed-remove tags matter and when timestamp ordering is enough.
